subject: [PATCH v5 07/21] nfsd: add callback encoding and decoding linkages for CB_NOTIFY

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds routines for encoding and decoding CB_NOTIFY messages in the NFS server (nfsd). It introduces new functions to handle the encoding and decoding of these messages, which are generated by the xdrgen tool. The patch also updates the state.h file with new definitions related to notification events. This change is part of a larger series of patches that aim to improve the performance and functionality of the NFS server.
